def negative_heavy_optional_dependency_imported_by_package_root():
    rule_id = "heavy_optional_dependency_imported_by_package_root"
    family = "packaging"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag package roots that import heavy optional dependencies by default."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
